title: PS-69448: Add targeted diagnostic logs for ad hoc report email pipeline
body:
[PS-69448](https://jira.trimble.tools/browse/PS-69448) Added targeted diagnostic logs for ad hoc report email pipeline.
Intended to be deployed to Staging, where the customer database is copied, and possibly to Production (as scheduled email services are turned off on Staging and not all of these can be tested there).

**Update:** The new log records the Notifier's final send outcome for ad-hoc-report notifications only, so next Tuesday we can see whether the request is being silently skipped (deleted, no email, no error). The enriched gate log is a smaller addition — it just lets us distinguish a silent generation failure from success at the existing log point.
author: sevilbk-trimble

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Adds diagnostic logging to help trace failures in the scheduled ad hoc report email pipeline (PS-69448), spanning the scheduler initiation path, report generation path, and report job execution path.

**Changes:**
- Logs ReportRequest configuration in `SchedulerService` immediately before initiating the report request.
- Logs key decision points in `ReportSystem.GenerateReportsAsync` around email send/queueing.
- Logs when report generation is skipped in the report job handler due to missing `m_RequestedBy`.

### Reviewed changes

Copilot reviewed 3 out of 3 changed files in this pull request and generated 2 comments.

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/Services/Scheduler/SchedulerService.cs | Adds an info log capturing key ReportRequest fields right before initiating scheduled ad hoc report requests. |
| Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/ReportSystem.cs | Adds diagnostic logs during report generation and email notification queueing for troubleshooting scheduled ad hoc emails. |
| Core/Business Layer/DataAccess/Report/JobHandler.cs | Adds a warning log when a report job cannot run because `m_RequestedBy` is null. |
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

reviews.body: Approved contingent upon the logging being reduced to just scheduled reports
reviews.author: kcostenbader

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

Copilot reviewed 4 out of 4 changed files in this pull request and generated no new comments.
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

review_comments.body: The PS-69448 diagnostic log here runs for every report generation (including non-ad hoc and non-email requests), which can add significant noise/volume and make the targeted scheduler email investigation harder. Gate this log to just the scheduled ad hoc email path (e.g., `ReportID == ADHOC_REPORT_IDENTIFIER && forEMail`).
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: `notificationRequest.RecordId` is logged before `SendReports()` persists the notification request via `NotificationSystem.CreateRequest(...)` (which is where `RecordId` is assigned). This means the logged `NotificationRequestID` will typically be 0 and can mislead diagnostics. Log after `SendReports()` (and only when not running under tests) so the ID is populated.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This diagnostic log is currently emitted for *all* ad hoc report generation, including non-email actions (e.g., ad hoc preview/view requests). That can create unnecessary log volume and makes the PS-69448 investigation harder. Gate it to the scheduled email path by requiring `forEMail` as well.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This PS-69448 log in the email path will run for every emailed report (not just ad hoc scheduled reports), which can add significant log noise. Since the PR is targeting diagnostics for the ad hoc report email pipeline, gate this log to `ADHOC_REPORT_IDENTIFIER` (and keep the existing test guard).
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: This diagnostic log is still emitted for *all* ad hoc report generation, including ad hoc preview/view requests (e.g., `GetReportRequestForAdHocPreviewAsync` builds an ad hoc `ReportRequest` with `Action = View` in this same file). That can create significant log noise and undermines the goal of targeted diagnostics for the scheduled email pipeline. Gate this log to the email path (`forEMail`).
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: Indentation on this `if` is off (it starts at column 1) which breaks readability and will likely violate the project's formatting rules/.editorconfig. Align it with the surrounding block indentation.
review_comments.author: Copilot

review_comments.body: The warning message leaks an internal field name (`m_RequestedBy`), which is less clear for operational diagnostics than describing the missing context. Consider rewording to a user-focused message (and keep the job identity prefix as you already do on the other warning above).
review_comments.author: Copilot
